abilities.name: stamina
abilities.shortEffect: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.
abilities.effect: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Defense stat when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.

abilities.name: sturdy
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead. Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is at full HP, any hit that would knock it out will instead leave it with 1 HP. Regardless of its current HP, it is also immune to the one-hit KO moves: Fissure, Guillotine, Horn Drill, and Sheer Cold. If this Pokémon is holding a Focus Sash, this ability takes precedence and the item will not be consumed.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

abilities.name: stalwart
abilities.shortEffect: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
abilities.effect: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.
abilities.flavorText: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.
